projectDescription: A MATLAB tool for computing the L-curve criterion in Tikhonov regularization, featuring analytic curvature computation and automatic knee detection.
keyFeatures: Analytic curvature computation of the log-L-curve (no finite differences)
Automatic knee region detection via iterative lambda search
Multiple linear solver methods: SVD, backslash, symmetrized backslash, inv, decomposition
Support for arbitrary regularization operators L (not just identity)
Matrix warm-up pre-computation for repeated evaluations
Returns osculating circle centers for curvature visualization
Compatible with general Tikhonov regularization problems: min |Ax-b|^2 + lambda*|Lx|^2
publicApiSurface: Lcurve(A) — warm-up / SVD pre-computation of matrix A
Lcurve(A, b, L, LAMBDAs) — evaluate L-curve coordinates and curvature for given lambdas
Lcurve(A, b, L, LAMBDAs, METHOD) — same with explicit solver method
Lcurve(A, b, L) — auto-detect optimal knee lambda
Lcurve(A, b, L, []) — auto-detect with default lambda exploration range
Lcurve(A, b, L, {initial_exploration}) — auto-detect with custom exploration range
[XYKCs, Ss] = Lcurve(...) — two-output form returning solutions and curvatures
